name: Grav
description:
Grav is a modern open-source flat-file CMS. It is fast, simple, and flexible, making it easy to create and manage your website.

On a slightly more technical level, Grav is a flat-file content management system, which means it doesn't use a database. Instead, it uses files and folders to store content, making it lightweight and easy to deploy.

notes.text: Set an admin user and password immediately after installation!
